title: God Needs Men
writer: Jean Aurenche, Pierre Bost, Henri Queffélec
actors: Pierre Fresnay, Madeleine Robinson, Daniel Gélin
plot: The island of Sein, in the nineteenth century, in Brittany. A crude population lives here on these windy shores, estranged from the rest of the world.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award4 wins & 2 nominations total
